## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles with no errors (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Changeset added if this is a user-facing change (`pnpm changeset`)

### Documentation

- [ ] **Docs updated** — If you added/changed/removed any API, hook, component, or behavior, update `apps/docs` accordingly
- [ ] New features have code examples in the relevant doc page
- [ ] Any renamed exports are updated in docs code snippets

> **Reminder:** The docs live in `apps/docs/`. When you change the library, update the docs in the same PR.
